Package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.model

Class Proveedor

java.lang.Object
co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.model.Proveedor
@Entity public class Proveedor extends Object
Entity class representing a supplier (Proveedor). This class maps to the "proveedor" table in the database and contains attributes related to supplier information. It is managed by JPA/Hibernate and used in the persistence layer to store and retrieve supplier data.
Author:
Wilmer Ramos

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

    Parameterized constructor to create a Proveedor instance with all fields except ID.

  • Constructor Details

    • Proveedor

      public Proveedor()
      Default constructor required by JPA.

    • Proveedor

      public Proveedor(Long nitProveedor, String nombreProveedor, String direccionProveedor, String ciudadProveedor, String telefonoProveedor)
      Parameterized constructor to create a Proveedor instance with all fields except ID.
      Parameters:
      nitProveedor - Tax identification number
      nombreProveedor - Name of the provider
      direccionProveedor - Address of the provider
      ciudadProveedor - City of the provider
      telefonoProveedor - Contact phone number
